change_boundary.what_changed: Implemented UCR trust root measurement chain (H_KERNEL_IMAGE, H_LAW_SPINE, H_CORRIDORS, H_BOOT_MANIFEST, H_TRUST_ROOT), boot manifest, kernel_boot seal, governed-mode invariants, cog_act_commit wiring, and contract docs.
change_boundary.why_changed: User spec for full boot trust binding and UCR governed-mode refusal on measurement mismatch.
assumptions: Law spine placeholder bytes used when contract markdown files are absent.
Kernel image stub path acceptable for v0.1 tests.
change_boundary.reversal: Remove src/ucr trust-root modules, tests, contract docs, and this manifest.

uncertainty.resolution_path: If law-spine placeholder bytes or kernel image stub are insufficient for target deployment, hold governed-mode claims until hardware-bound measurement evidence is attached.
